scenario_labels.label: qa-only
scenario_labels.description: Disposable QA profile only; deterministic seeded/faulted verification allowed
allowed_service_actions: POST /api/v1/actions/services/{service_id}/{verb} for test simulation in QA only

scenario_labels.label: live-readonly
scenario_labels.description: Production/live inspection with no state mutation
forbidden_http_methods: POST on live unless explicitly listed in live-allowlisted-mutation

scenario_labels.label: live-allowlisted-mutation
scenario_labels.description: Live operations where only explicitly allowlisted service restart actions are permitted
allowed_http_methods: POST only for explicit restart allowlist entries

required: POE_API_OPERATOR_TOKEN bearer token for protected /api/v1/ops/* and /api/v1/ml/* routes
optional_or_route_specific: allowed Origin header matching POE_API_CORS_ORIGINS when browser/CORS context is used

required: Valid session cookie named by POE_AUTH_COOKIE_NAME (default poe_session) for authenticated stash access
Valid POESESSID value only when performing explicit auth bootstrap flow via /api/v1/auth/session POST
forbidden_handling: Never persist raw POESESSID in evidence artifacts

required: Origin must be allowlisted when CORS headers are required
notes: Trusted-origin bypass exists for configured environments but is not accepted as the default live access control

live_mutation_allowlist.policy: Only explicit restart actions are approved in live-allowlisted-mutation mode; all other live mutations are forbidden.

restart_policy.approval_requirement: Restart must be explicitly approved in the scenario matrix and recorded in evidence before execution.
sequence: Issue exactly one allowlisted restart action
If still degraded, stop and escalate; do not chain multiple ad hoc mutations

forbidden_data_actions.policy: These actions are prohibited in QA and live review flows for task 1 and all downstream tasks unless superseded by an explicit, separately approved migration plan.
